[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Gar''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer.

==Biography==
As lieutenant in the Empire, Gar served under [[Sil Sorannan]] within the ranks of the [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]]. He was a prisoner who was held by the [[Yevetha]] at [[Camp Pa'aal]] on [[N'zoth]] after being captured by the invaders. Gar managed to escape Camp Pa'aal with Sorannan and recapture the [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Pride of Yevetha'']].
